meta.title: Reviews
meta.description: Read customer reviews and testimonials from satisfied {fullName} clients in {city} and surrounding areas.

props.title: Customer Reviews
props.subtitle: Hear from our happy customers! See why {fullName} is your go-to for reliable, professional plumbing services in {city}.

props.title: What Our Customers Say
props.description: Don't just take our word for it. See what our satisfied customers have to say about our plumbing services.

reviews.name: John Smith
reviews.content: Excellent service! The team arrived on time and fixed our water heater quickly. Very professional and reasonably priced. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Sarah Johnson
reviews.content: {fullName} saved the day when we had a major leak. They responded within an hour and had everything fixed same day. Outstanding work!

reviews.name: Mike Davis
reviews.content: Best plumbing service in LA! They installed our new bathroom fixtures perfectly. Clean, efficient, and great communication throughout.

reviews.name: Emily Chen
reviews.content: Called for a clogged drain and they came out the same day. Fair pricing and the technician explained everything clearly. Will use again!

props.title: Why Choose {fullName}?
props.subtitle: We're committed to providing exceptional plumbing services with integrity and professionalism.

items.title: Licensed & Insured
items.text: Fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind.

items.title: Upfront Pricing
items.text: No hidden fees or surprises. We provide clear quotes before any work begins.

items.title: 24/7 Availability
items.text: Emergency plumbing services available around the clock.

items.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
items.text: We stand behind our work with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.

props.title: Expert Plumbing Services in {city} and Surrounding Areas
props.description: Looking for reliable plumbing services in {city}? We provide expert residential and commercial solutions across the city.
